title: Minimal Kawaii Symbol Logo AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Kawaii Symbol Logo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimal cute symbol logo proposal for LUMIA SCENT, a 咖啡品牌, built around 小蓝蛙 holding a tiny coffee cup with a relaxed sleepy expression. Subject: 小蓝蛙 holding a tiny coffee cup with a relaxed sleepy expression becomes a simple, cute, relaxed, slightly emotional symbol with rounded lines, geometric outer contour, and high recognition. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed logo system composition: graphic symbol plus Chinese wordmark for LUMIA SCENT, optional small English subtitle BLUE FROG COFFEE, balanced spacing, clean alignment, and commercial brand-proposal clarity. Signature Elements: Single complete logo proposal, rounded minimal icon, simple cute emotional symbol, Chinese wordmark, optional English subtitle, flat vector feeling, geometric outer contour, hand-drawn softness, clean low-saturation palette, generous whitespace, and commercial lifestyle-brand identity finish. Fixed source details: Main Color: mist blue. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt is the main color, supported by one or two low-saturation auxiliary colors; the palette must stay clean, soft, modern, and commercially usable. Typography: LUMIA SCENT appears as the readable Chinese wordmark; BLUE FROG COFFEE appears only as a small optional English subtitle, natural and not overly decorative. Restrictions: Keep one complete readable logo system, clean background, concise icon shape, clear wordmark, balanced spacing, soft modern palette, commercial usability, and a simple brand-proposal presentation.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
